name: Kalyani Investment Company Limited
summary: Kalyani Investment Company Limited, a non-deposit taking core investment company, invests in listed and unlisted companies in India. It invests in companies of various sectors, including forging, steel, power generation, chemical, banking, etc. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Pune, India. Kalyani Investment Company Limited is a subsidiary of Sundaram Trading and Investment Private Limited.
